mapper.select: SELECT id, owner_user_id, storage_provider, bucket, object_key, public_url, mime_type, byte_size, width, height, linked_resource_type, linked_resource_id, status, created_at, deleted_at, purge_after_at FROM media.media_files WHERE id = #{mediaFileId}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM record.trip_record_entries record_entry JOIN trip.trips trip_row ON trip_row.id = record_entry.trip_id AND trip_row.status = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN trip.trip_members member ON member.trip_id = trip_row.id AND member.user_id = #{userId} AND member.status = 'ACTIVE' WHERE record_entry.id = #{recordId} AND record_entry.status = 'ACTIVE' AND (trip_row.owner_user_id = #{userId} OR member.id IS NOT NULL)
